items.question: How do I avoid ear fatigue on long streams?
items.answer: Generate alternate takes with the same prompt DNA, rotate tiles between segments, and high-pass shared mud if stacks get dense. Short decays beat long reverbs for rapid-fire boards. Rotating funny voices tags each month prevents ear fatigue paired with the same sting tiles.

items.question: What styles fit a comedy board best?
items.answer: Rimshots, kazoo buzzes, slide whistles, wrong-answer buzzers, spring boings, and meme-adjacent impacts. Split one-shots from beds so you can duck music without killing the room tone. Pairing funny voices one-shots with kazoo rows keeps thematic fit across the grid.
